infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WhatToWear uses the camera so you can photograph clothing to add to your closet.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WhatToWear needs photo access so you can add clothing from your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WhatToWear uses your location to fetch local weather and suggest weather-appropriate outfits.
